name: Rabanadas (Portuguese Fried Toast)
recipeIngredient: 8 slices White bread from square loaf
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the first three ingredients.
2. Soak the bread in this mixture.
3. Dip each slice carefully with a wide spatula into the beaten egg to cover both sides.
4. Transfer each slice to a frying pan containing plenty of butter that is quietly sizzling.
5. Fry golden-brown on both sides.
6. Sprinkle with sugar and cinnamon.
